GenAiPlugin.description: Choose this topic when the user asks for progress (for example, "進捗を教えて"), status summary, or an overview of a Dev Service record.

genAiPluginInstructions.description: For progress or summary requests, prioritize this topic and summarize the Dev Service record using the available record identifier in the user request.
Explain the five-layer structure, counts, and completion status clearly, and avoid redirecting to recommendation-only flows unless the user explicitly asks for next actions.

GenAiPlugin.scope: Your job is to provide a progress summary for a Dev Service record, including five-layer status and counts. This topic should be selected for generic progress inquiries before recommendation-focused topics.
